name: pptx-toolkit
description: > Audit PowerPoint (.pptx) decks for slide count, text density per slide, embedded images, embedded fonts, hidden slides, speaker notes presence, and animation density. Use when reviewing a board deck, sales deck, or conference talk before sending, or when the user mentions deck audit, pptx review, slide density, or speaker notes check.
author: borghei
summary_zh: 用来给 PPT 演示文稿做体检的工具，能快速查看页数、每页文字密度、嵌入的图片字体、隐藏页、备注和动画情况，适合在把董事会汇报、销售方案或大会演讲文件发出去前过一遍。
